name: Phosphodiesterase Type 5 (PDE5) Inhibitors - LiverTox overview
authors: National Institute of Diabetes and Digestive and Kidney Diseases
venue: LiverTox: Clinical and Research Information on Drug-Induced Liver Injury
summary: NCBI Bookshelf class overview stating that PDE5 inhibitors block cGMP breakdown and prolong nitric-oxide mediated vasodilation, with sildenafil, tadalafil, vardenafil, and avanafil approved for ED.

access_attempts.notes: Used overview lines on shared class mechanism, approved PDE5 inhibitors, and uncertainty about whether some rare safety signals are class effects or agent-specific.
